summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VTC pricing system. Backend APIs fully functional (27/27 tests passed). Frontend partially tested with session management issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Sessions expire very quickly causing frequent redirects to login page
Admin pricing page and client booking routes redirect to login even after successful authentication

integration_issues.issue: Could not fully test add/edit/delete category operations due to session expiry
Could not complete booking form testing due to session management issues

passed_tests: GET /api/vehicle-categories returns 4 default categories
All default categories have correct pricing (Berline: 2.50€/km, min 25€)
Van category pricing (3.00€/km, min 35€)
Luxe category pricing (4.00€/km, min 50€)
Green category pricing (2.80€/km, min 30€)
POST /api/estimate-price calculates prices correctly for all distances
Minimum fare logic applied correctly for short distances (5km)
Minimum fare logic applied correctly for medium distances (15km)
Minimum fare logic applied correctly for long distances (50km)
Admin can create new vehicle category
Admin can update vehicle category (price, min fare)
Admin can toggle category active/inactive
Admin can delete vehicle category
Client registration and booking with vehicle selection
Booking saved with vehicle_category_id and estimated_price
Frontend loads successfully
Admin login functionality
Admin pricing page displays all categories correctly
Client registration functionality
Price estimation integration between frontend and backend
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix session management issues: 1) Increase session timeout duration, 2) Implement proper session refresh mechanism, 3) Fix protected route authentication checks. Session expiry is preventing full frontend testing of admin CRUD and client booking flows.
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (27/27 tests passed), Frontend: 60% (session management issues prevent full testing)
